text.title: Video Async API — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Runway Gen-3 submit + poll with backoff + S3 download.

example.title: Provider config + job lifecycle
example.code:
provider: runway fallback: {provider: luma, trigger: timeout-or-permanent-fail} idempotency_key_template: "sha256(prompt+params+provider)" poll_backoff_seconds: [1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 30, 30, 30] total_wait_cap_seconds: 600 artefact_storage: bucket: prod-media key_prefix: video/2026/
VideoJob result: job_id: rw_abc123 provider: runway status: succeeded idempotency_key: "8f2a..." submitted_at: "2026-05-22T14:32:00Z" completed_at: "2026-05-22T14:35:20Z" artefact_url: "s3://prod-media/video/2026/05/22/rw_abc123.mp4" cost_usd: 0.50
example.note: r1 idempotency key, r2 backoff sequence, r3 600s cap, r4 S3 URL not provider URL, r5 Luma fallback declared.
